name: Sourdough Starter #6
recipeInstructions:
1. Let milk stand at room temperature in an uncovered container for a day.
2. Add flour to the milk and let it sit another couple of days, stirring occasionally.
3. When the mixture becomes active and smells right, it is ready to use.
NOTE: All containers used for starters not using yeast must be carefully scalded before use. If you are careless or do not scald them, the starter will fail.
